items.title: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
items.summary: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.

items.title: Rimski gej prajd zabranio sudjelovanje židovskoj LGBT skupini
items.summary: RIMSKI Pride zabranio je jedinoj židovskoj LGBT skupini u Italiji, Keshet Italia, sudjelovanje na godišnjoj paradi 20. lipnja, uz obrazloženje da nije jasno osudila postupke Izraela u Pojasu Gaze kao genocid. Odluka je izazvala brzu osudu židovskih organizacija.

items.title: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.summary: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.

items.title: Oil prices fall after report of breakthrough in US-Iran talks
items.summary: A report of a extended ceasefire, subject to Donald Trump's approval, has led to global oil prices to fall on Thursday.

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

items.title: Amerika opet napala Iran, Iran uzvratio napadom na američku bazu
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska izvela je nove napade na Iran, koji je uzvratio gađajući američku bazu.

items.title: Trumpova administracija htjela novčanicu od 250 dolara s njegovim likom
items.summary: DUŽNOSNICI Trumpove administracije vršili su pritisak za izradu novčanice od 250$ s Trumpovim likom, unatoč zakonu koji to brani. Pritisak je doveo do smjene direktorice nadležnog ureda.

items.title: U Italiji uhićena banda migranata. Oteli, drogirali i tri dana silovali turisticu
items.summary: PETORICA migranata u Italiji otela su stranu turisticu te ju puna tri dana držali zatočenom i grupno silovali.

items.title: Sinner shocked in French Open exit as Cerundolo recovers from two-sets down
items.summary: World number one Jannick Sinner beaten by 56th-ranked Argentinian opponent Juan Manuel Cerundolo at Roland Garros.

items.title: Teenager Kouame beats Vallejo at French Open to match 23-year Nadal record
items.summary: French teenager Moise Kouame, who became youngest Grand Slam match winner in first round, defeats Adolfo Daniel Vallejo.

items.title: Anti-Immigrant anger grows in South Africa as migrants forced onto streets
items.summary: Foreign nationals in Durban say they’ve been forced from their homes and businesses.

items.title: South African president to face impeachment probe over ‘Farmgate’ scandal
items.summary: Impeachment committee to hold first meeting next week as President Cyril Ramaphosa challenges findings in court.

items.title: Mojtaba Hamenei se u rijetkoj poruci obratio Irancima
items.summary: MOJTABA Hamenei, iranski vođa, pohvalio je jedinstvo nakon američko-izraelskih napada i pozvao na obnovu i političku stabilnost.

items.title: Ovo je najstariji događaj u povijesti za koji se zna točan datum
items.summary: DANA 28. svibnja 585. godine prije Krista dogodio se jedan od najneobičnijih trenutaka antičke povijesti. Usred krvave bitke između dviju velikih sila tadašnjeg svijeta, Lidijaca i Medijaca, nebo se iznenada zamračilo, a Sunce gotovo potpuno nestalo.

items.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

items.title: Gold Rush: Did CIA agent steal $40m in gold bars via work expenses?
items.summary: FBI says ex-CIA official David Rush repeatedly lied about his credentials in US government job applications.

items.title: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll
items.summary: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.

items.title: Italy seizes $232m in Mafia assets tied to Cosa Nostra
items.summary: Probe uncovers luxury resorts and offshore wealth as government crackdown targets Mafia networks.

items.title: Mamdani wears Arsenal thobe during Eid al-Adha celebrations
items.summary: Mamdani wears Arsenal thobe during Eid al-Adha celebrations

items.title: Why has Trump threatened to bomb Oman, amid Iran war escalation?
items.summary: The US president has issued a stark warning to a US ally, in a sign of rising tensions over Strait of Hormuz.
